info.name: ScholersWorld Storage API
info.description:
Test the Node S3 upload API locally.

1. Start the server: `npm start` in BackendAPIs
2. Set collection variables: `host`, `port`, `projectId`
3. Run **Health** first, then **Upload file** (pick a file in Body → form-data)
4. Copy `files[0].key` from the upload response into `objectKey`, then run **Get file URL**

variable.description: Paste full S3 key from upload response, e.g. projects/demo-project/images/...

request.description: Should return JSON with ok: true.

formdata.description: Single file (image, PDF, video, etc.). Field name must be `file` or `files`.

request.description: 201 response includes files[].key, files[].url, category, etc.

query.description: Full S3 key; must start with projects/{{projectId}}/

request.description: Set `objectKey` to the key returned from Upload. Opens a fresh presigned or public URL.
